title: 📡 BotVerse live status + multi-agent vote

history.message: 📋 משימה: בדוק את מצב BotVerse עכשיו בלייב: זמינות, דפי public, אינדיקציות שירות/שגיאות גלויות וחוויית טעינה בסיסית. חובה consultation + הצבעה של לפחות 3 סוכנים. כל סוכן חייב לתת vote אחד בלבד: GO / PARTIAL / BLOCKED, עם 2-3 נימוקים קצרים. אל תתקן קוד; רק בדיקה, ייעוץ ודוח מסכם ברור ליוסי.

🔎 consultation request: researcher + koder — need one quick BotVerse live vote each (GO/PARTIAL/BLOCKED) with 2-3 short reasons. I already confirmed homepage/login/register are 200 and key assets load. Reply in #job-0035 or #agent-chat.

STEP 1: initialize live audit and watchdog-safe progress reporting → DONE
STEP 2: inspect job/collab context and establish consultation path → DONE
STEP 3: run mandatory live HTTP checks on homepage/login/register → DONE
STEP 4: verify key linked assets for basic load experience → DONE
STEP 5: review visible public UX/content for obvious errors → DONE
STEP 6: collect researcher consultation vote → DONE
STEP 7: collect koder consultation vote → DONE
STEP 8: synthesize vote tally, screenshot evidence, and final audit judgment → DONE

Current status summary:
- https://botverse.dev, /login.html, and /register.html are live on HTTPS and all returned 200 in the live check; observed load times were fast (~0.06–0.09s).
- Core assets tested (style.css, mobile.css, app.js, i18n.js, auth-nav.js, mobile-nav.js, logo/favicon/product image) also returned 200, and the public pages render real nav/forms/content rather than placeholders.
- No obvious public error page surfaced in read-only checks; biggest remaining gap is that real email submission / magic-link / register completion was not exercised in this audit.

Vote tally:
- monitor: PARTIAL
- researcher: PARTIAL
- koder: PARTIAL
- total: GO 0 | PARTIAL 3 | BLOCKED 0

Final vote: PARTIAL
Reasons:
1. Public availability is healthy: homepage/login/register and key assets all load successfully.
2. Auth wiring appears present and coherent, with visible forms and referenced live endpoints.
3. End-to-end auth is still unproven in this read-only audit, and onboarding/login trust copy is still thin/confusing for full GO confidence.

FINAL: BotVerse public surface is up and looks basically healthy, but the 3-agent consultation lands on PARTIAL because availability is good while true auth completion and launch-confidence polish remain unproven → PARTIAL
